headline: Amazon Apologizes For Tweet Amid Claims That Its Workers Pee In Bottles
summary: Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) has issued an apology to Wisconsin congressman Mark Pocan over the issue of workers peeing into bottles.

headline: CEO John Krafcik Leaves Waymo
summary: Waymo's chief technology officer and its chief operating officer will serve as co-CEOs.

headline: Argo AI Mulling SPAC Or IPO Deal This Year
summary: Argo AI is considering going public through either a traditional IPO or a transaction with a SPAC.

headline: Is Now The Time To Buy Stock In Tesla, Netflix, Alibaba, Ford Or Facebook?
summary:
One of the most common questions traders have about stocks is “Why Is It Moving?”

That’s why Benzinga created the Why Is It Moving, or WIIM, feature in Benzinga Pro. WIIMs are a one-sentence description as to why that stock is moving.
